title: Urostachys bradeorum
taxonomy: Urostachys bradeorum is classified as a species of fern, specifically within the genus Urostachys. It belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. The family Lindsaeaceae is part of the larger order Polypodiales. This classification indicates Urostachys bradeorum's evolutionary relationships with other ferns. Urostachys bradeorum is also known to be native to South America.
